zh.Saffron Walden, Essex, England: 英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Fiennes於1250年出生在英國艾可時，她的父親Enguerrand de Fiennes58歲，母親Agnès de Condé de Morialmes35歲。她和Humphrey VI de Bohun至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1298年11月6日在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登享年48歲，埋葬在英國艾可武特萊斯福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde de Fiennes于1250年出生在英国艾可时，她的父亲Enguerrand de Fiennes58岁，母亲Agnès de Condé de Morialmes35岁。她和Humphrey VI de Bohun至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1298年11月6日在英国艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登享年48岁，埋葬在英国艾可武特萊斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fiennes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Finnis
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: locative name from Fiennes (Pas-de-Calais).  See also  Filtness  .

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Fiennes was born in 1250, in Essex, England, her father, Enguerrand de Fiennes, was 58 and her mother, Agnès de Condé de Morialmes, was 35. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Humphrey VI de Bohun. She died on 6 November 1298, in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Uttlesford, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de Fiennes est née en 1250, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Enguerrand de Fiennes, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Condé de Morialmes, avait 35 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Humphrey VI de Bohun. Elle est décédée le 6 novembre 1298, à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Uttlesford, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde de Fiennes 1250 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Enguerrand de Fiennes 58 und ihre Mutter Agnès de Condé de Morialmes 35. Sie hatte mit Humphrey VI de Bohun mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. November 1298 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Saffron Walden, Essex, England und wurde in Uttlesford, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Fiennes è nata il nel 1250 nel Essex, England, sua padre, Enguerrand de Fiennes, aveva 58 anni e sua madre, Agnès de Condé de Morialmes, aveva 35 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Humphrey VI de Bohun. Morì il 6 novembre 1298, nel Saffron Walden, Essex, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Uttlesford, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Fiennesが1250年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Enguerrand de Fiennesは58歳，母Agnès de Condé de Morialmesは35歳であった。彼女はHumphrey VI de Bohunとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1298年11月6日にイギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンで48歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスウットレスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Fiennes(이)가 1250년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Enguerrand de Fiennes(은)는 58세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès de Condé de Morialmes(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Humphrey VI de Bohun(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1298년 11월 6일 영국 에세스 사프런 월든에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 우틀레스퍼드에 묻혔다.

mn.Wendover, Buckinghamshire, England: Wendover, Buccingahamscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Fiennes nasceu em 1250, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Enguerrand de Fiennes, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Condé de Morialmes, tinha 35 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Humphrey VI de Bohun. Ela faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1298, em Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Uttlesford, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Fiennes родилась в 1250 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Enguerrand de Fiennes было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Condé de Morialmes, 35. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Humphrey VI de Bohun. Она умерла 6 ноября 1298 г. в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности уттлесфорд, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde de Fiennes nació en 1250, en Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Enguerrand de Fiennes, tenía 58 años y su mamá, Agnès de Condé de Morialmes, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Humphrey VI de Bohun. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1298, en Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Uttlesford, Essex, Inglaterra.
